details.IncidentDetail: "[1] RP FOUND A NOTE ON HER BLK MERZ GLC430 YESTERDAY SAYING THAT HER VEH WAS HIT BY MALE PTY'S BICYCLE - RP WAS GIVEN PTY'S CELLPHONE NUMBER - PTY ADVMITTED TO BREAKING RP'S TAIL LIGHT BUT NOT MAKING THE DENT THAT IS IN THE VEH - RP REQ 1110 - TC OCCURED IFO 574 S FRANKFURT AVE -RP DROVE TO WEST COVINA POLICE STATION - REQ UNIT TO 98 THERE - "
"[1] 3 VEH TC - RP IN A RED NISS SUV VS 2 SDNS - ALL VEHS ON RS - RP REQ 1110 "
"[1] HOMELESS XRAY THREW A MATTRESS INTO THE #4 LN - XRAY,POSS ON DRUGS, WENT BACK INTO THE BUSHES OF THE EMBANKMENT - SEMIS AND VEHS SWERVING TO AVOID "
"[3] RP NOW STATES VEHS BLKG STREET "
"[1] RP IN GRY TOYT RAV VS WHI FORD ESC- UNK IF BLKG "
"[2] CT TCK LOST DEBRIS AND HIT VEH "
